---
title: 'Hmm...'
date: '2016-03-16T11:50:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6021929677976743729'
blogger_filename: '/2016/03/hmm.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Recovery'
---

<br /><h3>I have an eclectic set of thoughts tonight.&nbsp;</h3><div><br /></div><div>My neck hurts, most of the time, but especially today. I don't like going to bed, my neck always hurts through the night, and I wake up stiff.<br /><br />So I'm sitting here listing to my "<a href="https://open.spotify.com/user/1236984646/playlist/4RfQ0LBtkmY0qhUbBu6I89">***Surrender***</a>" play-list on Spotify.<br /><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://ihaveennui.files.wordpress.com/2016/03/i-surrender.jpg" /></div><br />Revival not elections. Billye Brim reminded me that the Lord said through her prayer meetings that America will not be saved through elections, but through revival.<br /><br />That reminded me of how worked up I've been over this primary season.<br /><br />I'm also thinking about the episode of Librarians I just watched (Dark heart). The heart warming story of a serial killer... that they stopped. They freed a magic house to go and help people again.<br /><br />Work has been tough. I have two days off this week, so after tomorrow, four day weekend!<br /><br />I'm going to listen to my music and then go to bed.<br /><br /><br />Darrell</div>
